meals.description: Hemp hearts (>1/4 cup), peanut butter (1 tbsp), chia seeds (1/8 cup), mixed nuts (1/4 cup), dried cranberries (10)
meals.notes: High fat/fiber breakfast, nutrient-dense, low saturated fat

meals.description: Cheesy omelette (2-3 eggs + cheese), sausage (1 link), keto bread (2 slices), vegetable salad with corn/okra/peppers/tomatoes/greens (half portion)
meals.notes: Keto bread was smart choice (4g vs 30g), watch saturated fat from cheese/sausage (14g)

meals.description: Korean grilled short ribs (4-5 pieces, ~6.5oz), cauliflower rice (2 cups), kimchi soup with pumpkin & cabbage (1.5 cups, no corn), Chinese kale/gai lan (1 cup), blistered shishito peppers (7)
meals.notes: Excellent carb control, but high saturated fat meal (16g). Post-meal squats completed instead of walk due to dark.

meals.description: Keto bread (2 slices, toasted), avocado (1/2), tomato (1 medium), poached eggs (2)
meals.notes: Perfect low-carb, low saturated fat reset breakfast. Poached eggs = zero added fat. High fiber from keto bread and avocado.

meals.description: Thai coconut curry braised pork shoulder (~5oz), Chinese kale/gai lan (1 cup, grilled)
meals.notes: Low carbs but coconut curry destroyed saturated fat budget (19g from coconut milk + fatty pork shoulder).

meals.description: Street tacos (2): corn tortillas, carne asada (~4oz total), cilantro, onions, salsa, guacamole, lime, grilled jalapeño
meals.notes: Late night carbs (24g at 10pm) not ideal for glucose control.

meals.description: Keto bread (2 slices, toasted), avocado (1/2), tomato (1 medium), poached eggs (2), kale (1 cup), carrots (small amount, ~1/4 cup), hemp hearts (2 tbsp)
meals.notes: Excellent breakfast with great additions. Hemp hearts boosted protein and added omega-3s with minimal sat fat.

meals.description: Wife's 40th celebration: Beef tartare (shared), sourdough cheese balls (2), black cod, cavatelli with guanciale/black trumpets/swiss chard, orange panna cotta (shared), chocolate birthday cake (small)
meals.notes: Special occasion celebration meal - exceeded all daily targets significantly.

exercise.description: 1.9km run, pull-ups (14,12,10), dips (20,20,20), rows (20,20,20), squats (100), Bulgarian squats (50 each leg)
exercise.notes: Morning workout after celebration dinner, getting back on track
